title: Shawn Chidester
text: Home * People * Shawn Chidester Shawn Chidester [1] Shawn Chidester , an American senior software engineer at Attensity [2] , and as computer chess programmer author of the chess engines CACIO (early 90s in Turbo Pascal [3] ), Clubfoot , its bitboard counterpart Bitfoot , the experimental Clunk [4] , Bumblebee [5] , and the Senjo C++ UCI adapter. Senjo simplifies the UCI protocol implementation of engines written in C++, as demonstrated by Clubfoot, Bitfoot and Bumblebee [6] .
